title: Chapter 1
content: The first chapter establishes the world. Setting, mood, and a hint of what's to come.

title: A subsection
content: Within chapters, sub-headings often divide longer passages. The parser should preserve these as inline ##  markers, not as new chapters.

title: Chapter 2
content: The second chapter introduces conflict. Characters have wants; obstacles appear.

title: Chapter 3
content: The third chapter raises the stakes.
